mapper.sql: trip_id AS tripId, owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, title, description, trip_type AS tripType, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt

t.trip_id AS tripId, t.owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, t.title, t.description, t.trip_type AS tripType, t.start_date AS startDate, t.end_date AS endDate, t.status, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIP ( owner_user_id, title, description, trip_type, start_date, end_date, status ) VALUES ( #{trip.ownerUserId}, #{trip.title}, #{trip.description}, #{trip.tripType}, #{trip.startDate}, #{trip.endDate}, #{trip.status} )
INSERT INTO TRIP_MEMBER ( trip_id, user_id, member_role, invite_status, joined_at ) VALUES ( #{tripId}, #{userId}, #{memberRole}, #{inviteStatus}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_MEMBER tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.invite_status = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR tm.trip_member_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC, t.trip_id DESC

SELECT tm.trip_member_id AS tripMemberId, tm.trip_id AS tripId, tm.user_id AS userId, au.nickname AS nickname, tm.member_role AS memberRole, tm.invite_status AS inviteStatus, tm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM TRIP_MEMBER tm JOIN APP_USER au ON tm.user_id = au.user_id WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY CASE tm.member_role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, tm.joined_at ASC, tm.trip_member_id ASC

SELECT tm.trip_member_id AS tripMemberId, tm.trip_id AS tripId, tm.user_id AS userId, au.nickname AS nickname, tm.member_role AS memberRole, tm.invite_status AS inviteStatus, tm.joined_at AS joinedAt FROM TRIP_MEMBER tm JOIN APP_USER au ON tm.user_id = au.user_id WHERE tm.trip_id = #{tripId} AND tm.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT
FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_MEMBER tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.invite_status = 'ACCEPTED' WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND (t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR tm.trip_member_id IS NOT NULL)
